selectionRules.description: Always include the era's flagship laptop as the first product
Second product should be a monitor or display when possible
No more than one accessory (headset, mouse, keyboard) in a 3-product set
If user mentions travel/portability, prefer XPS 13 over larger laptops
If user mentions rendering, compiling, or speed, prefer Precision or higher-spec laptop
Within same score tier, sort by savings amount descending (anchor on value)
